```{=html}
<div>                        <script>window.PlotlyConfig = {MathJaxConfig: 'local'};</script>
        <script charset="utf-8" src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-3.5.0.min.js" integrity="sha256-fHbNLP+GlIXN+efbQec78UkemUz3NJp7UmfGxC1tNxs=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>                <div id="5389e325-d75e-4bff-a09f-c70d1d8011a3" class="plotly-graph-div" style="height:560px; width:100%;"></div>            <script>                window.PLOTLYENV=window.PLOTLYENV || {};                                if (document.getElementById("5389e325-d75e-4bff-a09f-c70d1d8011a3")) {                    Plotly.newPlot(                        "5389e325-d75e-4bff-a09f-c70d1d8011a3",                        [{"hoverinfo":"skip","line":{"color":"rgba(120,120,120,0.35)","width":3},"mode":"lines","showlegend":false,"x":[-29.218213462829592,29.218213462829592],"y":[0,0],"z":[0,0],"type":"scatter3d"},{"hoverinfo":"skip","line":{"color":"rgba(120,120,120,0.35)","width":3},"mode":"lines","showlegend":false,"x":[0,0],"y":[-29.218213462829592,29.218213462829592],"z":[0,0],"type":"scatter3d"},{"hoverinfo":"skip","line":{"color":"rgba(120,120,120,0.35)","width":3},"mode":"lines","showlegend":false,"x":[0,0],"y":[0,0],"z":[-29.218213462829592,29.218213462829592],"type":"scatter3d"},{"hovertemplate":"%{text}\u003cextra\u003e\u003c\u002fextra\u003e","marker":{"color":"#2ca02c","line":{"width":0},"opacity":0.85,"size":4.5},"mode":"markers","name":"Evaluation","text":["good (en, +)","nice (en, +)","beautiful (en, +)","pleasant (en, +)","kind (en, +)","bad (en, \u2212)","nasty (en, \u2212)","ugly (en, \u2212)","unpleasant (en, \u2212)","cruel (en, \u2212)","bueno (es, +)","agradable (es, +)","hermoso (es, +)","placentero (es, +)","amable (es, +)","malo (es, \u2212)","desagradable (es, \u2212)","feo (es, \u2212)","doloroso (es, \u2212)","cruel (es, \u2212)","bon (fr, +)","agr\u00e9able (fr, +)","beau (fr, +)","plaisant (fr, +)","gentil (fr, +)","mauvais (fr, \u2212)","d\u00e9sagr\u00e9able (fr, \u2212)","laid (fr, \u2212)","p\u00e9nible (fr, \u2212)","cruel (fr, \u2212)","gut (de, +)","nett (de, +)","sch\u00f6n (de, +)","angenehm (de, +)","freundlich (de, +)","schlecht (de, \u2212)","gemein (de, \u2212)","h\u00e4sslich (de, \u2212)","unangenehm (de, \u2212)","grausam (de, \u2212)"],"x":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"5rCbQW6y1kEAcIRBn+qVQa6RqEGN3D7BTNfKwQipzsHSmp\u002fBM8acwVJdj0A+28E\u002f5muuP3W\u002fY0DyPYI\u002fWdULwe6TmMCATMg964wrwFMYVsGN6TRBUKM2P25UrEDwdIJA0GK8QLJJ878AKTg\u002fmOkDv1hZxL7CWZDBQqD\u002fQKLODEEUSz2\u002f+IOWvo8DL0AgWz6\u002fNt3ZP6DEU7+ReZzAmo2JwA=="},"y":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"DCcjQY0r60BkuxdBgDslQG\u002fv00BegRZBLFoUQW1rAEGO2KxAhenUQOtvqkCYgFFAGMCBQIB+Kz1Uzsc\u002fNlXTPyREDMD4YgZARsMRQHw1CUE2tPtAsP8HQGyxQ0Ans0VAKhvRv25HV0B1Xo9A0a\u002f4wEUBJUDCxQ9BsHjVQIjiWUBM93FAqBGVQF4OuT+EGnJAjM9PQGwYikC4Jes+4th0QA=="},"z":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"XqhZQJGDlb4+z2lANrnPPvh9pL\u002fwnBPAH1pjv7gj0cCR7k3Aax0ZwAyRjj9jyyJAribQP8S3i7\u002fyw+s\u002fSbq1wJ6jOsBA2ek\u002fUyF\u002fPx8uKL88+zFAknkrQAQOtj\u002f3hX0\u002fTSoKwOK9ID\u002fDAgZAOusswe6eP77RC1TAWmehP9QDyD+Ws5U+4F1CQLw+jUCOvZM+vIweQCYv4z9j\u002fjXAkHIKPw=="},"type":"scatter3d"},{"hovertemplate":"%{text}\u003cextra\u003e\u003c\u002fextra\u003e","marker":{"color":"#d62728","line":{"width":0},"opacity":0.85,"size":4.5},"mode":"markers","name":"Potency","text":["strong (en, +)","powerful (en, +)","big (en, +)","heavy (en, +)","hard (en, +)","weak (en, \u2212)","powerless (en, \u2212)","small (en, \u2212)","light (en, \u2212)","soft (en, \u2212)","fuerte (es, +)","poderoso (es, +)","grande (es, +)","pesado (es, +)","duro (es, +)","d\u00e9bil (es, \u2212)","impotente (es, \u2212)","peque\u00f1o (es, \u2212)","ligero (es, \u2212)","blando (es, \u2212)","fort (fr, +)","puissant (fr, +)","grand (fr, +)","lourd (fr, +)","dur (fr, +)","faible (fr, \u2212)","impuissant (fr, \u2212)","petit (fr, \u2212)","l\u00e9ger (fr, \u2212)","mou (fr, \u2212)","stark (de, +)","m\u00e4chtig (de, +)","gro\u00df (de, +)","schwer (de, +)","hart (de, +)","schwach (de, \u2212)","machtlos (de, \u2212)","klein (de, \u2212)","leicht (de, \u2212)","weich (de, \u2212)"],"x":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"YaBTwB9JdcCLxyTAWikDwchfB8ECwwvBJuknwdqxqMDgXWa+MGJqPuNdjr8gTcI+8FfdvnGCVMDrjCvA3dfMv5iMd8Dqzdm\u002fkpY5wLRZEL+Q1pBAtB8QwFZ\u002fkD9cBmm\u002fAUdLwUhe2758AxDAWLdIv1wGab+ySfO\u002fiFbuwGyBVb+WhorAFEs9v6DEU78gWz6\u002fIBjNv968sL\u002f8Wri\u002f+KOHvw=="},"y":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"YgtGQdpJckHFC4xBZgZfQWYGikESwmTBCIRswf43OsH+ppvB81mAwTiEREDQArI+VYwTQWeoHkBGwxFAZBZlPxC9TEB6wlbA8M1hv+IEKD9hURZBm1cyQCgwRUEFBt0\u002fiI8hQW5IRkBWpZ1AqniKwAUG3T9uR1dA9drWQKVczT8gFqhATPdxQGwYikCEGnJArD8UQPp8nz+A5Ow9ZoKtPw=="},"z":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"mZmVQA+spEC99bZAVYkfQBTlHMBubQXBEE4TwV8\u002fGsDG9JZABvG3v7p\u002fGj8BE22+Dc5OP7pjDsBTIX8\u002fVPBqv+B\u002fgr+r6I3AKOwFv5AwN8BkWFNAxEDTv6WaFkBIUKu+XTdLvrgvjz+zWTO\u002fjD+EwEhQq77ivSA\u002fV7Y3P2q8xr9++P++lrOVPiYv4z+OvZM+O1daPywvlb6uoJ0\u002fUISNvQ=="},"type":"scatter3d"},{"hovertemplate":"%{text}\u003cextra\u003e\u003c\u002fextra\u003e","marker":{"color":"#1f77b4","line":{"width":0},"opacity":0.85,"size":4.5},"mode":"markers","name":"Activity","text":["active (en, +)","fast (en, +)","lively (en, +)","quick (en, +)","energetic (en, +)","passive (en, \u2212)","slow (en, \u2212)","calm (en, \u2212)","sluggish (en, \u2212)","lazy (en, \u2212)","activo (es, +)","r\u00e1pido (es, +)","vivo (es, +)","\u00e1gil (es, +)","en\u00e9rgico (es, +)","pasivo (es, \u2212)","lento (es, \u2212)","tranquilo (es, \u2212)","perezoso (es, \u2212)","inactivo (es, \u2212)","actif (fr, +)","rapide (fr, +)","vif (fr, +)","agile (fr, +)","\u00e9nergique (fr, +)","passif (fr, \u2212)","lent (fr, \u2212)","calme (fr, \u2212)","paresseux (fr, \u2212)","inactif (fr, \u2212)","aktiv (de, +)","schnell (de, +)","lebhaft (de, +)","flink (de, +)","energisch (de, +)","passiv (de, \u2212)","langsam (de, \u2212)","ruhig (de, \u2212)","tr\u00e4ge (de, \u2212)","faul (de, \u2212)"],"x":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"8HKNwLLctb+AqBc9+B\u002fAvr64qMBoLp3A+KElwaitnUBTKC3B\u002fboIwf7ziL8w5pi\u002f\u002f+SBwBSBPsBuaCLAqAy3vwVChcCVLVpAiD+NwMdpbsBsnLe\u002f2PkxvzDDYz6gdUS\u002feqsswKCQH784DO3AWNKhv1hZxL7A4ojAANx1vyhxZD9SOri\u002fYKaevhA+Gj78Kio\u002fyMQOwL31GMDUlgS\u002fKWYuwA=="},"y":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"1rBQQBAneD8e7J1A4AMhv4OElUDP2LzAovK9v5F0jsCxlL\u002fApanKwE63oD+yyg9Afr5HP6buBD9oxVg\u002fXGHJv8RbRcAQ1ca+sAncvkgNuz5W1npAEFUQQDSZjEBGSTzA6Ao\u002fQJCl+r6l1rDAsKwkPkUBJUAcJLK\u002f61NQQADzCkDggO498AVUv0ArjUDIFK8+jVL8P7wXRkBb2QtAMHF+QA=="},"z":{"dtype":"f4","bdata":"YWGsQcjmXUEgK6FBZT5oQR69kUFund7B3gpewVnR1cA3xI3BzICxwa\u002fQz0C+X7g\u002f8tEDQQDXorsAlxo8mBV2wFhcD8HqhJTAkVeGwCeBCcDDArhAGg5WQBbzbkC4PmZAhPc6Pg4j4b9JI1fBUImGve6eP77B8ZzAy89+P07pjT+klJ0\u002fICI1vF4buEBHzg\u002fAEbz9vmNjbj+M\u002fRA\u002fE1Vcvw=="},"type":"scatter3d"}],                        {"template":{"data":{"barpolar":[{"marker":{"line":{"color":"white","width":0.5},"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"barpolar"}],"bar":[{"error_x":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"error_y":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"marker":{"line":{"color":"white","width":0.5},"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"bar"}],"carpet":[{"aaxis":{"endlinecolor":"#2a3f5f","gridcolor":"#C8D4E3","linecolor":"#C8D4E3","minorgridcolor":"#C8D4E3","startlinecolor":"#2a3f5f"},"baxis":{"endlinecolor":"#2a3f5f","gridcolor":"#C8D4E3","linecolor":"#C8D4E3","minorgridcolor":"#C8D4E3","startlinecolor":"#2a3f5f"},"type":"carpet"}],"choropleth":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"type":"choropleth"}],"contourcarpet":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"type":"contourcarpet"}],"contour":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"type":"contour"}],"heatmap":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"type":"heatmap"}],"histogram2dcontour":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"type":"histogram2dcontour"}],"histogram2d":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"type":"histogram2d"}],"histogram":[{"marker":{"pattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2}},"type":"histogram"}],"mesh3d":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"type":"mesh3d"}],"parcoords":[{"line":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"parcoords"}],"pie":[{"automargin":true,"type":"pie"}],"scatter3d":[{"line":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scatter3d"}],"scattercarpet":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scattercarpet"}],"scattergeo":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scattergeo"}],"scattergl":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scattergl"}],"scattermapbox":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scattermapbox"}],"scattermap":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scattermap"}],"scatterpolargl":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scatterpolargl"}],"scatterpolar":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scatterpolar"}],"scatter":[{"fillpattern":{"fillmode":"overlay","size":10,"solidity":0.2},"type":"scatter"}],"scatterternary":[{"marker":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"type":"scatterternary"}],"surface":[{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""},"colorscale":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"type":"surface"}],"table":[{"cells":{"fill":{"color":"#EBF0F8"},"line":{"color":"white"}},"header":{"fill":{"color":"#C8D4E3"},"line":{"color":"white"}},"type":"table"}]},"layout":{"annotationdefaults":{"arrowcolor":"#2a3f5f","arrowhead":0,"arrowwidth":1},"autotypenumbers":"strict","coloraxis":{"colorbar":{"outlinewidth":0,"ticks":""}},"colorscale":{"diverging":[[0,"#8e0152"],[0.1,"#c51b7d"],[0.2,"#de77ae"],[0.3,"#f1b6da"],[0.4,"#fde0ef"],[0.5,"#f7f7f7"],[0.6,"#e6f5d0"],[0.7,"#b8e186"],[0.8,"#7fbc41"],[0.9,"#4d9221"],[1,"#276419"]],"sequential":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]],"sequentialminus":[[0.0,"#0d0887"],[0.1111111111111111,"#46039f"],[0.2222222222222222,"#7201a8"],[0.3333333333333333,"#9c179e"],[0.4444444444444444,"#bd3786"],[0.5555555555555556,"#d8576b"],[0.6666666666666666,"#ed7953"],[0.7777777777777778,"#fb9f3a"],[0.8888888888888888,"#fdca26"],[1.0,"#f0f921"]]},"colorway":["#636efa","#EF553B","#00cc96","#ab63fa","#FFA15A","#19d3f3","#FF6692","#B6E880","#FF97FF","#FECB52"],"font":{"color":"#2a3f5f"},"geo":{"bgcolor":"white","lakecolor":"white","landcolor":"white","showlakes":true,"showland":true,"subunitcolor":"#C8D4E3"},"hoverlabel":{"align":"left"},"hovermode":"closest","mapbox":{"style":"light"},"paper_bgcolor":"white","plot_bgcolor":"white","polar":{"angularaxis":{"gridcolor":"#EBF0F8","linecolor":"#EBF0F8","ticks":""},"bgcolor":"white","radialaxis":{"gridcolor":"#EBF0F8","linecolor":"#EBF0F8","ticks":""}},"scene":{"xaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"white","gridcolor":"#DFE8F3","gridwidth":2,"linecolor":"#EBF0F8","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"#EBF0F8"},"yaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"white","gridcolor":"#DFE8F3","gridwidth":2,"linecolor":"#EBF0F8","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"#EBF0F8"},"zaxis":{"backgroundcolor":"white","gridcolor":"#DFE8F3","gridwidth":2,"linecolor":"#EBF0F8","showbackground":true,"ticks":"","zerolinecolor":"#EBF0F8"}},"shapedefaults":{"line":{"color":"#2a3f5f"}},"ternary":{"aaxis":{"gridcolor":"#DFE8F3","linecolor":"#A2B1C6","ticks":""},"baxis":{"gridcolor":"#DFE8F3","linecolor":"#A2B1C6","ticks":""},"bgcolor":"white","caxis":{"gridcolor":"#DFE8F3","linecolor":"#A2B1C6","ticks":""}},"title":{"x":0.05},"xaxis":{"automargin":true,"gridcolor":"#EBF0F8","linecolor":"#EBF0F8","ticks":"","title":{"standoff":15},"zerolinecolor":"#EBF0F8","zerolinewidth":2},"yaxis":{"automargin":true,"gridcolor":"#EBF0F8","linecolor":"#EBF0F8","ticks":"","title":{"standoff":15},"zerolinecolor":"#EBF0F8","zerolinewidth":2}}},"margin":{"l":0,"r":0,"t":10,"b":0},"legend":{"orientation":"h","y":1.02,"x":0.5,"xanchor":"center"},"scene":{"xaxis":{"title":{"text":"Evaluation (good\u2013bad)"},"zeroline":true,"showbackground":false},"yaxis":{"title":{"text":"Potency (strong\u2013weak)"},"zeroline":true,"showbackground":false},"zaxis":{"title":{"text":"Activity (active\u2013passive)"},"zeroline":true,"showbackground":false},"camera":{"eye":{"x":1.6,"y":1.5,"z":1.1}},"aspectmode":"cube"},"height":560},                        {"scrollZoom": true, "displayModeBar": false, "responsive": true}                    )                };            </script>        </div>
```
